title: Evaluation of the Annual Investment Allowance
body: "The Annual Investment Allowance (AIA) is a relief that can be claimed by businesses on the cost of plant and machinery. In 2022, a business could claim up to 100% of an investment up to a value of £1 million to help reduce the potential tax liability for that business.    This research aimed to:       gather evidence on the efficacy of the AIA     the extent to which it meets its original objectives      its impact on business investment (direct and indirect)     how appropriate AIA was as a support measure     proportionality of the tax relief      IFF conducted 1,350 Computer Assisted Telephone Interviews, and 50 in-depth interviews with claimant businesses and non-claimant businesses, as well as an econometric analysis of business data.   "
